arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 instance

status.description: The status of the ECS cluster

pipelineVersion.title: Pipeline Version
pipelineVersion.description: The version of the pipeline definition

pipelineExecutionId.description: The unique identifier for the pipeline execution

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the pipeline execution

statusSummary.title: Status Summary
statusSummary.description: A summary of the status of the pipeline execution

executionMode.title: Execution Mode
executionMode.description: The execution mode for this pipeline execution

pipelineExecutionDisplayName.title: Display Name
pipelineExecutionDisplayName.description: The display name for the pipeline execution

trigger.title: Trigger

artifactRevisions.title: Artifact Revisions

variableValues.title: Variable Values

stageStates.description: The state of all stages in the pipeline execution

createdAt.title: Created At

region.title: Region
